'''Paul Southern''' (born 18 March 1976) is a former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s, 2000s and 2010s for [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]], [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]], [[Rochdale Hornets]], [[Oldham RLFC|Oldham]], [[Swinton Lions]] and [[Halifax RLFC|Halifax]].

Southern was an [[Ireland national rugby league team|Ireland]] international and played at the [[2000 Rugby League World Cup]].
